name: Terri Berdis (Tigert)
narrative: PreKindergarten-Kindergarten PE Teacher at Austin Achieve Public Schools (Jul 2017-present). Previously Special Education Paraprofessional at Meridian Middle School and Head Women's Varsity Soccer Coach at Meridian High School in Bellingham, Washington. Also worked in children's activities recreation at Walt Disney World and as Program Assistant Intern at Boys and Girls Club of the Redwoods. Bachelor of Social Work from Humboldt State University.
